title: SignatureMetadata
description: Common metadata describing how a CIAF-LCM object was signed.

signature_algorithm.description: The cryptographic signature algorithm used for externally verifiable receipts.

key_id.description: Stable identifier for the signing key (enables key rotation and lookup).

canonicalization_version.description: Canonicalization profile applied before hashing and signing (e.g., RFC8785-like/1.0).

key_backend.description: Backend used to protect and/or invoke the signing key (mandatory for audit trail).

signing_service.description: Logical service or provider performing the signing operation.

public_key_ref.description: Reference to the public verification key, certificate, or verifier material (e.g., jwks:// URL).

verification_method.description: Reference to the verification profile or verification procedure (e.g., ciaf-verify/v1).
